name: 5dim_locale
title: 5Dim's mod - Locales
author: 5Dim
description:
Localization module for 5Dim's mod
Provides translations for all 5Dim's modules
Supported languages:
- Afrikaans, Arabic, Catalan, Czech, Danish
- German, Greek, English, Spanish, Finnish
- French, Hebrew, Hungarian, Italian, Japanese
- Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese
- Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Swedish, Turkish
- Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Chinese
Contribute translations via Crowdin!
